item.title: About
item.description: Hey! Welcome to my page. I’m Shunt / terawhiz, C.S undergraduate student /24. Started playing CTFs (w/5h4d0wb10k3r) in my first year of college focused on Web Exploitation Later in 2021, Binary Exploitation caught my interest (I’ll write a story in future). Currently holding Blue belt in pwn.college XD Also have a slight interest in Cryptography Not a very good writer but I’ll try to blog about tech and my lifestyle. And writeups.
